concerns.text: SC-005 requires a 'sensitivity curve of p-values across a range of motion thresholds'. The plan.md mentions a 'sensitivity curve' in the Research.md section (Section 3.3) but the Implementation Plan (plan.md) lacks a specific phase, task, or data-model entity to generate this curve. The plan only mentions the 3mm threshold in the Summary and Constitution Check. Without a dedicated step to re-run QC at varying thresholds (e.g., 2mm, 4mm) and plot the results, this success criterion is unbacked.

FR-011 mandates 'edge-wise statistical testing for each DMN connection individually... in addition to the global mean metric'. The plan.md Summary mentions 'computes condition-specific connectivity strength metrics (FR-004, FR-005)' and 'non-parametric paired permutation test (FR-006)'. While FR-006 is covered, there is no explicit mention of the *edge-wise* testing component of FR-011 in the plan's phases, data model (which only defines a single 'mean_absolute_correlation' in Result), or contracts. The plan risks implementing only the global metric and missing the edge-wise analysis required by FR-011.
